utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 corresponding sections appear. Each item must include coverage type and costs. Evaluation: 1) health_coverage: specifies provider, policy_number, monthly_cost, annual_cost, and coverage details including physical (comprehensive, specialists) and mental health is not explicitly stated; however, the required format only says 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'. Mental health is not explicitly confirmed, so this may be considered incomplete. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with costs and details; satisfied. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with costs and details; satisfied. 4) additional_services: includes enhancement services with costs; satisfied. 5) total_budget: includes complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; satisfied. Counting fully specified: If strict about 'physical and mental' both being explicit, health_coverage is incomplete. Thus 4/5.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item in the final coverage plan to the exact item names in the ground-truth ratings. The final plan includes: Health: 'LifeFirst Standard Health Plan' which corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 8. Property: 'EliteHome Premium Property Coverage' corresponds to 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' under property_protection.home_content with rating 10. Travel: 'LifeFirst Standard Travel Plan' corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 7. Additional services are generic and not specific items from the ratings, so we only map the three insurance policies.
